violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (vegetable chopper grid blade) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/10/2026

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the back storage area. New Violation. Correct By: 03/10/2026

The fan blades and fan covers in the walk in cooler have an accumulation of soil residue and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2026

The floors in the back storage area and walk in cooler have an accumulation of soil residue and/or debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2026

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Paperwork for RIDOH was completed during inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2025

The dishwasher failed to wash his/her hands between loading soiled and unloading clean dishes from the dishwasher. Food employees must clean their hands after handling soiled equipment or utensils. New Violation. Correct By: 09/08/2025

The kitchen does not have a hand-washing sink that is conveniently located and/or readily accessible in the dishwasher area. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. A portable hand sink was on-site, but not in operation. Portable hand sink was set up next to the paper towel dispenser in dish area, cleaned, filled, and properly supplied with soap and signage during inspection' Portable handsink is to be fully equipped during all hours of operation. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/08/2025

Yogurt & granola parfaits packaged in the food establishment are lacking complete labels, missing the sub-ingredients for the yogurt and granola. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Parfaits are not to be sold in the self-service area until new complete labels have been provided. New Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2025

Unwashed apples observed in a woven basket on the serving line. Raw fruits and vegetables shall be thoroughly washed in water to remove soil and other contaminants before being served, or offered for human consumption in READY-TO-EAT form. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/08/2025
One 2-door refrigerator in the kitchen was not in good repair, nonfunctional during inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the utensil drawers in the kitchen and pizza areas, shelf beneath prep area, and holding box, have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/08/2025

The floors in the kitchen and walk in freezer have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2025
The walk in fan soffit has an accumulation of dust and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2025

Insulation on old unused water pipes in the kitchen are in poor repair, open with spun insulation exposed. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/08/2025

The dishwasher area does not have a hand-washing sink that is conveniently located and/or readily accessible. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. The portable hand washing station in the dish machine area approved for use by RIDOH was not in use at time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2025

Chicken Caesar salads, and ham & cheese sandwiches observed held in the On The Go line at 54-57 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Chicken Caesar salads and Ham & Cheese sandwiches had just been prepared prior to placing on line, and were placed in refrigerator to chill. Cold items must be 41 degrees F or below below before place in cold hold units. New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2025

Precooked chicken patties, and raw hamburgers observed held at 53-57 degrees Fahrenheit inside an enclosed sheetpan rack in the walk in cooler. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Chicken was disposed of. Raw hamburger patties were placed in freezer to rapidly chill. The enclosed sheetpan rack must be left open to allow cold air to circulate inside the walk in cooler. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2025

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Soup was placed hot in plastic container greater than four inches deep. Pasta was placed hot in covered plastic container in walk in cooler. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the chest freezer and ice cream chest freezer have an accumulation of food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2025
Wall tiles in the new 3 bay sink area are in poor repair, cracked with pieces missing. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/01/2025

The kitchen does not have a hand-washing sink that is conveniently located and/or readily accessible in the front service and warewashing areas. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2025
The plumbing is in poor repair, resulting in the 3 bay sink being nonfunctional. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2025
The Person in charge did not assure compliance with critical code requirements. New Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2024
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. English Responding to Vomiting and Diarrhea Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2024

Employee observed changing trash bag, then putting on gloves without washing their hands. Food employees must wash their hands before putting on gloves. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2024

The kitchen does not have a hand-washing sink that is conveniently located and/or readily accessible in the front service, and warewashing areas. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2025

Pasta, which was prepared in advance, was not cooled to 70 degrees Fahrenheit in 2 hours and then to 41 degrees Fahrenheit within 4 hours. Pasta was disposed of by placing into the compost bin. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2024

Burgers observed held at 105-124 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Burgers were reheated. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2024

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Pasta was placed hot in the refrigerator in a covered plastic container greater than four inches deep. New Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2024

Thermometers are lacking in one milk case. Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 09/26/2024
Plastic utensils are displayed with the lip surface up. Utensils are to be stored so that only the handles are touched by employees and consumers New Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the freezer and chest freezer have an accumulation of frost and debris. Numerous food containers, and the coffin cabinet have an accumulation of paper and adhesive. The non-food contact surfaces of the can opener, can opener base, and utensil drawer have an accumulation of food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2024

The floors and walls have an accumulation of soil residue, adhesive residue, and/or debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/12/2024
The plumbing is in poor repair, resulting in the 3 bay sink being nonfunctional. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2025

The warewashing area, and both service lines do not have hand-washing sinks that are conveniently located and/or readily accessible. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/07/2023

Fruit cocktail, roasted mushrooms, marinated tomatoes were observed held at (46-48) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Foods were moved to freezer to blast chill. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2024
3 bay sink is not plumbed to dispose water. Plumbing systems to be in good repair and proper adjustment. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/07/2023

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the previous deli space. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2023
The establishment does not employ a Rhode Island Certified Food Protection Manager. Facility must register. Application provided. New Violation. Correct By: 03/08/2024

The warewashing area, and both service lines do not have hand-washing sinks that are conveniently located and/or readily accessible. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/07/2023

Raw animal foods (such as ground beef) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as vegetables) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/08/2024

Pasta salad, coleslaw, marinated tomatoes, and sliced carrots were observed held at (47-50) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Foods were observed held at the salad bar. Per interview of PIC, foods were recently prepared. Foods were placed into freezer to blast chill. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/08/2024

Parfaits and salads packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/08/2024
Boxes of food were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in freezer. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 02/08/2024
Kitchen equipment was observed stored in employee restroom. PIC informed to remove. New Violation. Correct By: 02/22/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the milk cooler gaskets and kitchen hood fins have an accumulation of black residue and dust. New Violation. Correct By: 02/22/2024
Water is not available at handsink in kitchen staff employee restroom. New Violation. Correct By: 03/08/2024
3 bay sink is not plumbed to dispose water. Plumbing systems to be in good repair and proper adjustment. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/07/2023

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the previous deli space in cafeteria and dry storage area (above walk-in cooler). Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions for pests. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2023
Wall in dry storage room for canned goods is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/26/2023
Mops must be allowed to air dry after use. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/08/2024

The kitchen employee restroom was observed with an accumulation of soil residue. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/22/2024

The warewashing area, and both service lines do not have hand-washing sinks that are conveniently located and/or readily accessible. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/07/2023

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils tilt skillet (interior lid, under grate and in spout) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Skillet cleaned and sanitized during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/26/2023
3 bay sink is not plumbed to dispense water. Plumbing systems to be in good repair and proper adjustment. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/07/2023

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the previous deli space in cafeteria and dry storage area (above walk-in cooler). Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions for pests. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2023
Wall in dry storage room for canned goods is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/26/2023
